page_metadata.biocontainers__summary: Search against FingerPRINTScan with a protein query sequence to identify the closest matching PRINTS sequence motif fingerprints in a protein sequence.
page_metadata.biotools__summary: Scan a protein sequence against PRINTS to identify the closest matching PRINTS sequence motifs/fingerprints.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Scan a protein sequence against PRINTS to identify the closest matching PRINTS sequence motifs/fingerprints.
